title: dicliptera sanctae-martae
intro: Dicliptera sanctae-martae, also known as Santa Marta False Dragonhead, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae. The plant is native to the mountainous regions of Colombia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Dicliptera sanctae-martae contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas and infusions, and is also used in some traditional remedies in the form of tinctures and extracts.
